summary.title: Support delisting stale phishing domain
summary.abstract: The phishing domain flagged in docket BLACKLIST-2026-04-12 has been inactive for eight weeks and the operator forfeited all deposits. This brief summarises the investigation log, affected wallet IDs, and telemetry confirming the threat window has closed.
summary.requested_action: Approve delisting provided replicas confirm zero unresolved appeals.

fact_table.claim: Torii case TR-2219 concluded with a verified restitution payment on 2026-03-02.
SoraNet telemetry shows zero traffic to the domain over the 30-day cooling window.
One affected wallet still holds restitution funds because the operator has not completed KYC.

disclosures.details: I am paid an hourly retainer to manage phishing takedown reports.

moderation.notes: Awaiting KYC completion for remaining restitution; otherwise ready for publication.
